mapper.select:
SELECT A.* FROM FILE_MANAGE A LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_INFO B ON A.FM_UI_USER_EMAIL = B.UI_EMAIL WHERE
A.FM_UI_USER_EMAIL = #{FM_UI_USER_EMAIL} AND A.FM_UP_FILE_ID = #{FM_UP_FILE_ID}
SELECT A.*, B.UI_BACK_SEAT_PHONE_NUM FROM FILE_MANAGE A LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_INFO B ON A.FM_UI_USER_EMAIL = B.UI_EMAIL WHERE A.FM_ID = #{FM_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILE_MANAGE ( FM_UI_USER_EMAIL, FM_FILE_NAME, FM_FILE_PATH, FM_FILE_SIZE, FM_FILE_EXTENSION_TYPE, FM_FILE_TYPE, FM_UP_FILE_ID, FM_REG_DATE ) VALUES( #{FM_UI_USER_EMAIL}, #{FM_FILE_NAME}, #{FM_FILE_PATH}, #{FM_FILE_SIZE}, #{FM_FILE_EXTENSION_TYPE}, #{FM_FILE_TYPE}, #{FM_UP_FILE_ID}, NOW() );
